translation: From the Kanesh colony to Aqil<gap> dātum, our messenger, kārum and Wabarrat: This tablet has been deposited for you.
In accordance with the tablet about how much silver has been concluded for me, in Nemilum, Dān-Aššur shall not raise claim against Ewarimuša.

If you have heard our letter, then we shall send it to an affiliated trader as witnesses, or what is in front of a merchant's house, but no one must reach us." We also before Aššur-lamassī arrives I am staying about.
I sent our tablets to Karma and Wabarratum in accordance with the matter.
